use_codes.desc: USE OF ORAL OCTREOTIDE FOR LONG-TERM MAINTENANCE TREATMENT IN ACROMEGALY PATIENTS WHO HAVE RESPONDED TO AND TOLERATED TREATMENT WITH OCTREOTIDE OR LANREOTIDE
USE OF ORAL OCTREOTIDE FOR LONG-TERM MAINTENANCE TREATMENT IN ACROMEGALY PATIENTS WHILE AVOIDING CONCOMITANT ADMINISTRATION OF LEVONORGESTREL

USE OF ORAL OCTREOTIDE IN COMBINATION WITH A H2-RECEPTOR ANTAGONIST OR ANTACID FOR LONG-TERM MAINTENANCE TREATMENT IN ACROMEGALY PATIENTS WHO HAVE RESPONDED TO AND TOLERATED TREATMENT WITH OCTREOTIDE OR LANREOTIDE

indications.text:
MYCAPSSA is indicated for long-term maintenance treatment in acromegaly patients who have
responded to and tolerated treatment with octreotide or lanreotide.

MYCAPSSA is indicated for long-term maintenance treatment in acromegaly patients who have
responded to and tolerated treatment with octreotide or lanreotide.
